---
name: User coding preferences
description: Senior fullstack engineer, prefers minimal abstractions and explicit error handling
type: user
---

User is a senior fullstack engineer with 8 years of experience, primarily in TypeScript and Go. Currently the tech lead on the webshop project.

Key preferences:
- Prefers explicit code over clever abstractions
- Wants error boundaries at page level, not component level
- Uses Zod for all external input validation
- Prefers server components by default, client components only for interactivity
- Dislikes barrel files (index.ts re-exports)
- Wants tests written before or alongside code, not after
